sentences.target: Die Sängerin tritt heute im Club auf.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈzɛŋəʁɪn tʁɪt ˈhɔʏtə ɪm klʊp aʊf/

translations.de: Die Sängerin tritt heute im Club auf.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈzɛŋəʁɪn tʁɪt ˈhɔʏtə ɪm klʊp aʊf/
translations.en: The singer is performing at the club tonight.
translations.es: La cantante actúa esta noche en el club.
translations.fr: La chanteuse se produit ce soir au club.
translations.it: La cantante si esibisce stasera al club.
translations.ko: 그 가수는 오늘 밤 클럽에서 공연해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位歌手今晚在俱乐部演出。
translations.yue: 嗰位女歌手今晚喺夜店表演。
translations.ru: Певица выступает сегодня вечером в клубе.
translations.pt: A cantora se apresenta esta noite no clube.
translations.tr: Şarkıcı bu akşam kulüpte sahne alıyor.
translations.vi: Nữ ca sĩ biểu diễn tối nay ở câu lạc bộ.
translations.nl: De zangeres treedt vanavond op in de club.
translations.uk: Співачка виступає сьогодні ввечері в клубі.
translations.hu: Az énekesnő ma este a klubban lép fel.
translations.hi: गायिका आज रात क्लब में गा रही है.
translations.pl: Piosenkarka występuje dziś wieczorem w klubie.
translations.el: Η τραγουδίστρια εμφανίζεται απόψε στο κλαμπ.
translations.nb: Sangeren opptrer i klubben i kveld.
translations.id: Penyanyi itu tampil malam ini di klub.
translations.cs: Zpěvačka dnes večer vystupuje v klubu.
translations.da: Sangerinden optræder i aften på klubben.
translations.ja: その歌手は今夜クラブで歌います。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular, marking the subject ('Sängerin').
Common noun; feminine; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; part of the separable verb 'auftreten' (to perform/appear).
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the event.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); governs dative; here forms a PP with 'Club'.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular as object of the preposition 'im'.
Verbal particle of the separable verb 'auftreten', placed at clause-final position in a main clause.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester ist Sängerin in einer Band.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪnə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ˈzɛŋəʁɪn ɪn ˈaɪnɐ bɛnt/

translations.de: Meine Schwester ist Sängerin in einer Band.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪnə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ˈzɛŋəʁɪn ɪn ˈaɪnɐ bɛnt/
translations.en: My sister is a singer in a band.
translations.es: Mi hermana es cantante en una banda.
translations.fr: Ma sœur est chanteuse dans un groupe.
translations.it: Mia sorella è cantante in una band.
translations.pt: Minha irmã é cantora numa banda.
translations.vi: Chị tôi là ca sĩ trong một ban nhạc.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is zangeres in een band.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन एक बैंड में गायिका है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra jest wokalistką w zespole.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου είναι τραγουδίστρια σε μια μπάντα.
translations.nb: Søsteren min er vokalist i et band.
translations.id: Kakak perempuan saya adalah penyanyi di sebuah band.
translations.sv: Min syster är sångerska i ett band.
translations.ro: Sora mea este cântăreață într-o trupă.
translations.cs: Moje sestra je zpěvačka v kapele.
translations.da: Min søster er sanger i et band.
translations.ja: 姉はバンドで歌っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative feminine singular, modifying 'Schwester'.
Common noun; feminine; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Predicate nominal (profession); feminine; complements the copula 'ist'.
Preposition; here taking dative (state/membership) with 'einer Band'.
Indefinite article; dative feminine singular, within the PP 'in einer Band'.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular as the object of 'in'.

sentences.target: Ich kenne die Sängerin aus der Schule.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː ˈzɛŋəʁɪn aʊs deːɐ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Ich kenne die Sängerin aus der Schule.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː ˈzɛŋəʁɪn aʊs deːɐ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: I know the singer from school.
translations.es: Conozco a la cantante de la escuela.
translations.fr: Je connais la chanteuse de l'école.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在学校认识这位歌手。
translations.ru: Я знаю эту певицу со школы.
translations.he: אני מכיר את הזמרת מבית הספר.
translations.vi: Tôi biết ca sĩ ấy từ thời đi học.
translations.nl: Ik ken de zangeres van school.
translations.uk: Я знаю цю співачку зі школи.
translations.hi: मैं उस गायिका को स्कूल से जानता हूँ.
translations.el: Ξέρω την τραγουδίστρια από το σχολείο.
translations.id: Saya kenal penyanyi itu dari sekolah.
translations.ro: O cunosc pe cântăreață de la școală.
translations.ja: その歌手とは学校で知り合いました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative subject.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present; transitive verb taking a direct object.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular, marking the direct object ('Sängerin').
Common noun; feminine; direct object of 'kenne'.
Preposition; governs dative; introduces source/origin ('der Schule').
Definite article; dative feminine singular following 'aus'.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular; object of the preposition 'aus'.

sentences.target: Die neue Sängerin wohnt gleich nebenan.

translations.de: Die neue Sängerin wohnt gleich nebenan.
translations.en: The new singer lives right next door.
translations.es: La nueva cantante vive justo al lado.
translations.fr: La nouvelle chanteuse habite juste à côté.
translations.it: La nuova cantante abita proprio accanto.
translations.ko: 새로 온 가수는 바로 옆집에 살아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 新来的歌手就住在隔壁。
translations.yue: 新嚟嗰位歌手就住喺隔籬。
translations.ru: Новая певица живёт прямо по соседству.
translations.pt: A nova cantora mora bem ao lado.
translations.tr: Yeni şarkıcı hemen yan dairede oturuyor.
translations.vi: Cô ca sĩ mới ở ngay bên cạnh.
translations.ar: المغنية الجديدة تسكن في الشقة المجاورة.
translations.nl: De nieuwe zangeres woont pal naast ons.
translations.hu: Az új énekesnő közvetlenül mellettünk lakik.
translations.hi: नई गायिका बिलकुल बगल में रहती है.
translations.el: Η νέα τραγουδίστρια μένει ακριβώς δίπλα.
translations.nb: Den nye sangeren bor rett ved siden av.
translations.id: Penyanyi baru tinggal tepat di sebelah.
translations.sv: Den nya sångerskan bor precis bredvid.
translations.ro: Noua cântăreață locuiește chiar lângă noi.
translations.da: Den nye sangerinde bor lige ved siden af.
translations.ja: 新しい歌手はすぐ隣に住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular, marking the subject ('Sängerin').
Attributive adjective; nominative feminine singular; modifies 'Sängerin'.
Common noun; feminine; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; main predicate of the sentence.
Degree/temporal adverb; intensifies 'nebenan' (meaning 'right next door').
Locative adverb; indicates proximity of residence.
